name: Cajun Chicken Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into thin strips
1 cup heavy cream (or evaporated skim milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken and Cajun seasoning in a bowl or resealable plastic bag; toss to coat.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, saute chicken in butter until almost tender, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add peppers, mushrooms, and onions; cook and stir for 2-3 minutes.
4. Reduce heat.
5. Add cream and seasonings; heat through.
6. Add linguini and toss; heat through.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese if desired.
